title: Track Flooding near Leeds
evidence: Network Rail reports infrastructure failure due to water ingress in cable duct. Delays of up to 45 mins expected.

assessment.justification: Railway Marketplace advisory issued for the region. Multiple infrastructure failures and track flooding reported.
assessment.synthesis: Evidence shows localized environmental stress and reported infrastructure failure based on official reports.
assessment.confidenceStatement: This is a Medium confidence assessment.
